Event: The Runic Adventure
Event Date: 08/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E46
Cold of Helheim Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner deals magic damage to 2 random enemy units in the amount equal to 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% of the targets' max health. The affected units are also frozen for 2 sec. They can't move or attack for the duration. It also increases the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner deals pure damage to 3 random enemy units in the amount equal to 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% of the targets' max health.
The affected units are also frozen for 3 sec. They can't move or attack for the duration. It also increases the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner deals pure damage to 3 random enemy units in the amount equal to 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% of the targets' max health.
This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The targets also have deep freeze applied to them for 3 sec. Frozen units can't move and attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 300000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the icicles deal 30600 / 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 45% / 46% / 47% / 48% / 50% / 52% / 55% for 3 sec.

Requirements:
